title: poa subuniflora
intro: Poa subuniflora, also known as single-flowered meadow-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Poa subuniflora include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote skin health and reduce the risk of infection.
